zh.lifeSummary: 當Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford於1110年出生在英國奧可福爾時，他的父親Alberic Aubrey DE VERE25歲，母親Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE35歲。他於大約1136年與Lucia DE Essex結婚。他於1141年被列為lord great chamberlain。他去世於1194年12月26日在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Aubrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

variants.name: Aubree
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford was born in 1110, in Oxfordshire, England, his father, Alberic Aubrey DE VERE, was 25 and his mother, Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, was 35. He married Lucia DE Essex about 1136. In 1141, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as lord great chamberlain. He died on 26 December 1194, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford est né en 1110, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Alberic Aubrey DE VERE, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lucia DE Essex environ 1136. En 1141, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord great chamberlain. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1194, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford 1110 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alberic Aubrey DE VERE 25 und seine Mutter Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE 35. Er hat um 1136 Lucia DE Essex geheiratet. 1141, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord great chamberlain aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1194 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Earls Colne, Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford è nato il nel 1110 nel Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Alberic Aubrey DE VERE, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lucia DE Essex circa 1136. Nel 1141, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord great chamberlain. ja.lifeSummary: Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxfordが1110年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alberic Aubrey DE VEREは25歳，母Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLAREは35歳であった。約1136年にLucia DE Essexと結婚した。1141年，31歳の時，職業はlord great chamberlainと記録されている。彼は1194年12月26日にイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford(이)가 1110년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alberic Aubrey DE VERE(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1136년 Lucia DE Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 1141년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord great chamberlain이었다. 그는 1194년 12월 26일 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford nasceu em 1110, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alberic Aubrey DE VERE, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia DE Essex aproximadamente 1136. Em 1141, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord great chamberlain. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1194, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford родился в 1110 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alberic Aubrey DE VERE было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia DE Essex около 1136 г. В 1141 году, в возрасте 31 год,  он работал по профессии lord great chamberlain. Он умер 26 декабря 1194 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford nació en 1110, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alberic Aubrey DE VERE, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adeliza Fitzgilbert DE CLARE, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lucia DE Essex aproximadamente 1136. En 1141, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era lord great chamberlain. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1194, en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
